fields.name: Screen2_DISPLAY_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Catering Details

fields.name: Do_you_have_experience_working_in_the_Catering_industry
fields.fieldText: Do you have experience working in the Catering industry?

fields.name: Type_of_Catering_work_wanted
fields.fieldText: What type of Catering work do you have experience in?

fields.name: Please_let_us_know_what_other_experience_you_have
fields.fieldText: Please let us know what other experience you have:

fields.name: Years_Experience
fields.fieldText: How many years experience do you have working within the Catering industry?
